selected_hypothesis: A causal pre-entry session cutoff can remove the known mandatory-flatten defect from fast_book_477b while preserving enough of its unusually high exact 20-day target velocity to justify unchanged chronological validation.
strongest_argument_against: The apparent 2/4 normal and 2/4 stressed exact passes may depend on the noncompliant MNQ events, only four full 20-day starts exist, and B4 contributes one of the two passes.

frozen_tripwire_gate.interpretation: Tier-E development signal only; passing creates no promotion and requires a frozen next validation.

expected_information_gain: HIGH: directly distinguishes a repairable execution defect from a noncausal false near-pass using already reconstructed exact ledgers.
expected_economic_upside: HIGH_BUT_UNDERPOWERED: prior inadmissible exact diagnostic reached 2/4 normal and 2/4 stressed passes with approximately 95.46%/94.42% median target progress and zero MLL breach at 20 days.

alternative_audit.existing_signal: Legacy development showed positive 1.5x-cost net and a diagnostic 15-day scaled Combine path.
evidence_debt: requires clean causal fill/account reconstruction before any claim
alternative_audit.selection_reason: Lower value of information per compute minute than the 477b session repair, but the next materially distinct action if both repair shards fail.
